name: Bridget Gainer
bio: Bridget Gainer is the incumbent 10th District Commissioner seeking re-election to a fourth full term. She is a well-established Democrat representing the lakefront/NW Cook County area. She is challenged by Drake Warren, an engineer.
prior_office: Cook County Commissioner District 10 (multiple terms, long-serving). Previously worked in financial services.

jacket.source: Illinois State Board of Elections (not retrieved)
jacket.note: Campaign finance not retrieved; long-term incumbent likely well-funded

career_history.role: Cook County Commissioner District 10 (4th term candidacy)
